name: compute_stat
description: Compute a statistic on a list of numbers. Supported stat_type: mean, median, std, variance, min, max, sum, percentile, correlation.

stat_type.description: Statistic to compute: mean, median, std, variance, min, max, sum, percentile, correlation.

data2.description: Second list of numbers (required for correlation).

percentile_value.description: Percentile to compute (0-100). Required when stat_type=percentile.

name: describe
description: Return summary statistics (count, mean, std, min, 25%, 50%, 75%, max) for a list of numbers.
